name: Miglior Cat Food Pouch Salmon & Tuna 100g
shortDescription: Formula designed to guarantee the key nutrients required for the well-being of your cat, including vitamins, Omega 3, calcium and phosphorous to support strong bones and teeth, healthy skin and glossy coat, and toned musculature.
